characters.name: Aelfwynn
characters.description: AelfwynnCharacter InformationStatus:DeceasedDeath:The ThawManner of Death:TortureHome:London,EnglandOrigin:Northumbria,EnglandAllegiance:Emma of NormandyLivelihood:Lady-in-waitingTitle:LadySignificant Other/s:Godwin(fiancé)Parents:Unnamed FatherSiblings:Unnamed Half-brother †Three Unnamed SistersBehind the ScenesPortrayed byMaria GuiverSeason/s:2First appearance:The Web of FateLatest appearance:The ThawMentioned in:Birth and RebirthLeap of FaithThe ReckoningAppearance Count:3 Aelfwynnis one of QueenEmma's ladies-in-waiting. Aelfwynn comes from a large family. Her father was displaced, like many, when KingCanuteplacedJarlNóriin charge of a shire inNorthumbria. She has three older sisters who are all married. She also has a half-brother, but she is not close with him.

characters.name: Aldwin
characters.description: AldwinCharacter InformationFull name:AldwinStatus:AliveAge:27Home:Wessex,EnglandOrigin:Wessex,EnglandAllegiance:KingAlfredLivelihood:CommanderTitle:CommanderBehind the ScenesPortrayed byJamie MaclachlanSeason/s:Season 5Appears in:BaldurAppearance Count:1Aldwinis aSaxoncommander. Aldwin accompaniesUbbeandTorvito defeat theBlack Danes. He argues with the both of them, not trusting the pair ofVikings, thinking that of course they'd betray and turn on them. He is initially left speechless by Ubbe. He is later left with the army camping nearby while Ubbe and Torvi negotiate with the enemies.

characters.name: Amma/Spoilers
characters.description: AmmaCharacter InformationFull name:AmmaStatus:DeceasedBorn:802/803 ADAge:18 (Season 5)19 (Season 6)Death:821 AD;King of KingsManner of Death:Shot byGanbaatarHome:Kattegat,NorwayYork,England(formerly)Origin:NorwayAllegiance:KingBjornKingHarald(formerly)Livelihood:Shield-maidenBehind the ScenesPortrayed byKristy Dawn DinsmoreSeason/s:Season 5,Season 6First appearance:What Happens in the CaveLatest appearance:King of KingsAppearance Count:11Ammais ashield-maidenin KingHarald's army. She returns toKattegatand becomes fond ofHvitserk, trying to help him with his addictions. Amma joinedBjorn Ironsideand King Harald's raiding party to return to Kattegat and dethroneIvar. During the trip across the Baltic, she was asked to watch overMagnus. During the massive storm ride, she overheard Magnus praying in fear to God, notOdin, and questioned him about it. Magnus denied to her that he was a Christian.

characters.name: Amma/Spoilers
characters.description: AmmaCharacter InformationFull name:AmmaStatus:DeceasedBorn:802/803 ADAge:18 (Season 5)19 (Season 6)Death:821 AD;King of KingsManner of Death:Shot byGanbaatarHome:Kattegat,NorwayYork,England(formerly)Origin:NorwayAllegiance:KingBjornKingHarald(formerly)Livelihood:Shield-maidenBehind the ScenesPortrayed byKristy Dawn DinsmoreSeason/s:Season 5,Season 6First appearance:What Happens in the CaveLatest appearance:King of KingsAppearance Count:11Ammais ashield-maidenin KingHarald's army. She returns toKattegatand becomes fond ofHvitserk, trying to help him with his addictions. Amma joinedBjorn Ironsideand King Harald's raiding party to return to Kattegat and dethroneIvar. During the trip across the Baltic, she was asked to watch overMagnus. During the massive storm ride, she overheard Magnus praying in fear to God, notOdin, and questioned him about it. Magnus denied to her that he was a Christian.

characters.name: Angantyr
characters.description: AngantyrCharacter InformationFull name:AngantyrStatus:AliveHome:Reading,EnglandOrigin:DenmarkAllegiance:Black DanesKingHemmingKingFrodoLivelihood:KingTitle:KingBehind the ScenesPortrayed byMarkjan WinnickSeason/s:Season 5First appearance:BaldurLatest appearance:What Happens in the CaveAppearance Count:2King Angantyris aVikingking and a leader of theBlack Daneconfederation. Angantyr, Hemming and Frodo arrive at the Arle River and are spotted by saxon scouts. King Alfred is later informed by his scouts that another huge viking army arrived at the coast. Alfred sends Ubbe and Torvi to negotiate with them to avoid another battle. Ubbe and Torvi arrive at the Arle River with forces of King Alfred, leaded by Aldwin. Ubbe and Torvi decide to enter the kings camp without the saxon forces. Aldwin distrusts Ubbe and thinks he will join the viking army in a war against Alfred. Ubbe tells Aldwin to trust him like Afred does.

characters.name: Angrboda
characters.description: Angrboda FlokadottirCharacter InformationFull name:Angrboða FlókadóttirStatus:DeceasedDeath:Kill the QueenManner of Death:Succumbed to feverHome:Kattegat,NorwayOrigin:Kattegat,NorwayParents:Floki(father)Helga†(mother)Behind the ScenesPortrayed byRosalie ConnertySeason/s:Season 2,Season 3,Season 4First appearance:The Lord's PrayerLatest appearance:Kill the QueenMentioned in:Murder Most FoulAppearance Count:6Angrboda Flokadottiris the daughter ofFlokiandHelga, named after the GiantessAngrboðainNorse Mythologyand the first wife of the trickster GodLoki.  Helga joyfully announces the news of her pregnancy to Floki, who is excited until he realizes that his unborn child will have a "terrible father." Helga tells Floki that he is not terrible and the news is happy. Floki agrees and says that they should get married.

characters.name: Anna
characters.description: AnnaCharacter InformationFull name:AnnaStatus:AliveAge:Early 20'sHome:Kiev,Kievan RusOrigin:Kievan RusAllegiance:PrinceDirLivelihood:PrincessTitle:PrincessSignificant Other/s:Dir(husband)Oleg†(former lover)Relatives:Askold†(brother-in-law)Rurik† (second cousin-in-law)Igor(second nephew-in-law)Behind the ScenesPortrayed byIsabelle ConnollyAlso portrayed by:Serena Kennedy(Season 6A)Season/s:Season 6First appearance:The ProphetLatest appearance:All At SeaAppearance Count:5 Annais a former mistress to PrinceOlegand the wife of PrinceDir. Anna marries Prince Dir in secret so that Oleg wouldn't find out and threaten to kill her. However Dir did not know that Anna used to be Oleg's former mistress. Oleg quickly found about the marriage and takes Anna as a hostage and prisoner to negiotate with Dir and let him, Ivar and Igor travel back to Novgorod. Dir agrees to the terms and travel back to Kiev with Anna.
